summary: Completed testing of Top Firme feature with sorting and pagination on JudetPage, LocalitatePage, and CaenPage. All backend APIs working correctly (14/14 tests passed). UI verified with screenshots showing correct implementation.

backend_api: GET /api/locations/judet/teleorman/top-firme - returns ranked companies sorted by cifra_afaceri (default)
frontend_ui: JudetPage: Tab system with 'Top Firme' and 'Localitati' tabs
JudetPage: Top Firme tab active by default
JudetPage: Sort buttons visible (Cifra de afaceri, Profit net, Nr. angajati)
JudetPage: Companies table with rank, denumire, localitate, CAEN, cifra afaceri, profit, angajati columns
JudetPage: Top 3 companies have medal styling (colored circles)
JudetPage: Companies sorted by cifra de afaceri descending
LocalitatePage: Sort buttons visible (Cifra afaceri, Angajati, A-Z)
LocalitatePage: Companies sorted by cifra de afaceri by default
LocalitatePage: Table with denumire, CUI, CAEN, stare, cifra afaceri, juridic columns
CaenPage: Judet filter buttons visible (București, Cluj, Timiș, etc.)
CaenPage: Sort buttons visible (Cifra afaceri, Angajati, A-Z)
CaenPage: Companies sorted by cifra de afaceri by default

critical_code_review_comments: Code implementation is correct and follows best practices
Sort parameters properly handled in backend routes
Rank field correctly calculated based on skip offset
Frontend properly uses data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing company data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Top Firme feature fully implemented and tested. JudetPage has tab system (Top Firme/Localitati), sort buttons (cifra_afaceri, profit, angajati), and pagination (100 per page). LocalitatePage has sort controls (cifra_afaceri, angajati, alfabetic). CaenPage has judet filters and sort controls. All backend endpoints support sort parameter. Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_top_firme_feature.py
